body:
`docs/demo/*`

Should be moved to `./src/web` folder.

As in previous issues, we need to continue to work on the vision.

For example messages from the users like:

- What is artificial intelligence? (like as in `What is wikipedia?`, but we should truly support all phases and words and symbols, as fetch to wiki services will work just fine in GitHub Pages and in other environments)

All existing messages, but in Russian, Hindi, and Chinese should also work

```
- Привет 
- Кто ты?
- Что такое википедия?
```

Please continue on expend on test cases, make sure for web application on GitHub Pages we have e2e tests locally (for Pull Requests) and also remotely on https://link-assistant.github.io/formal-ai directly after deploy. So we should confirm e2e tests work both locally and on deployed version.

Double check our previous issues are fully implemented, reflected in our vision and docs.

And continue working on our full vision well free to expand and experiment, try to make it as real as possible. For as large cases as possible. We need to do our best, for our AI system to actually reason through, have universal algorithms as part of its universal algorithm, that actually go and discover enough information to get things done. So we should prioritize real understanding, algorithms that are recorded in links notation, not in code, are dynamic and updatable by talking, while keep supporting all previous and new features.

Please ensure we use doublets-web (in browser) and doublets-rs in all other places (like we do in http://github.com/link-foundation/link-cli), we should prefer named references by default, so it will be easy for user to query the database with text and words, and everything can be translated to his language just in time.

By default in telegram bot, CLI and server mode (+ microservice) we should prefer embedded version of http://github.com/link-foundation/link-cli (meaning use it as library, if that mode is not yet available we should report issue to http://github.com/link-foundation/link-cli, while temporary coping enough code to reproduce it locally).

All create/update/read operations with internal links memory system should be possible to do directly with links notation language, and also with natural language, so user can talk with AI about its inter structure, memory and experience.

We should always keep associative network in doublets of the AI system itself, so it knows what it is, how it is build, what it consists of and so on.

And user should not be a programmer to get that info, meaning we should be able to talk with user in natural language as well as in formal languages.

Also in web UI, we need to have export/import buttons to fully export seeded + modified links notation fully representing entire memory of AI + seed data + dialogs histories + all cached data, that collected while AI was browsing the web. And we also should support import. In web app, it should be stored in local storage as plain text links notation, or in indexed db (and so on depending on the size of data, we should use appropriate long term storage for browser). Yet when operating, we should use doublets-web, and doublets-rs (in other environments) for must faster search and creation. As we should operate in append only mode by default the links notation itself is like log of transactions, and on load from local storage and so on, we should be able to have 2 versions of doublets links store, once will store current state or state at specific point at time (time machine or state), and one of instances should represent the log (append only structure) itself.

So we need to ensure that while supporting all the features with all the same real code, we have correct architecture of everything. And also all docs are synced.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: Continue working on our vision
